message:
feat(config): Add CAAM_HOME environment variable support

Introduces CAAM_HOME as an alternative to XDG Base Directory paths for
configuring where caam stores its data. This enables:

- Setting CAAM_HOME to relocate all caam data (vault, database, configs)
  to a custom directory (useful for testing, isolated installations, or
  portable setups)
- Automatic migration of existing XDG data to CAAM_HOME/data when the
  env var is set, without overwriting existing files or deleting sources
- Safety checks to prevent migration loops (target within source path)

Changes:
- config.go: DefaultDataPath() now checks CAAM_HOME first; added
  MigrateDataToCAAMHome() with copyTreeSkipExisting() helper
- authfile.go: DefaultVaultPath() now respects CAAM_HOME
- Added comprehensive tests for migration scenarios including edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
